titleStmt.title: SII 15.173: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 173. (B.K. No. 89 of 1929-30.) HEBBĀḶ, BAGEVADI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab standing before the Vīrabhadra temple.

This is dated in the 42nd regnal year of the king, Virōdhi, Kārttika-amāvāse, Monday. The said tithi of the cyclic year Virōdhi falling in the reign of Singhaṇa corresponds to 1229 A.D., November 17. But the weekday was Saturday. The regnal year 42 as engraved on the stone appears to be a mistake for 32. The date portion also mentions eclipse and Saṅkramaṇa, which are superfluous.
It records a gift of land to the god Mūlasthāna by Dēvarasa, the Mahāprabhu of Hebbaḷa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgasiraścuṁbi caṁdracāmara
cāravē trailōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhā
ya śaṁbhavē . svasti śrīmatu yādavanārāyaṇa bhuja
baḷapratāpacakravartti śrī siṁghaṇadēvavavaruśada da 42 neya virō
dhi saṁvatsarada kārttikabahuḷa yamāvāsa sōmavāra vitipa
ta grahaṇa saṁkramaṇadali śrīmatu hebbaḷa mā
haprabhu dēvarasaru taṁna kulasvāmi mula
tana(sthāna)dēvara yaṁdu dhārapurvvakadiṁda koṭṭa
vritti 24 nālku mataru haṁgarage
ge hōda baṭṭeyiṁda muḍalu sthaḷa mulasta(sthā)
nadēvara hiriya ya
Oḷage Oṁdu Aṁtī mataru Ipa
tumana nivēsaṇa sāḷigeya koṭṭa
gade svadattaṁ paradatavara(dattaṁ vā) yō
harēti vasuṁdharāṁ saṣṭirvarṣasahaśrāṇi
miṭhayaṁ (viṣṭhāyāṁ) jayatē krimi .
Digital edition of SII 15.173 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
